results.title: JD Vance Calls for a Vote on SAVE Act: Put Everyone on Record
results.description: John Thune says they “don’t have the votes” to pass the SAVE America Act. Yet, some say they have 50 votes to pass the Act with a Talking Filibuster. President Trump has tied FISA and 702 to the passage of the SAVE Act. If it isn’t possible to pass it, let’s find out who is [...] The post JD Vance Calls for a Vote on SAVE Act: Put Everyone on Record appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Most Israelis believe Iran emerged stronger from war — Poll suggests
results.description: A new opinion poll has revealed growing skepticism among Israelis over the outcome of the recent Middle East conflict, with many respondents believing that Iran emerged stronger from the war and subsequent agreement with the United States, raising concerns about Israel’s long-term security. The survey, conducted amid ongoing political debate over the conflict’s aftermath, found [...] The post Most Israelis believe Iran emerged stronger from war — Poll suggests appeared first on Daily Nigerian .
